creator: dev2@heesakkers.info
text:
Created attachment 217922
Proposed patch

Thanks for the headsup.

They've moved from libusb 0.1 to 1.0*, which provided some trouble. The patch-configure can probable be done more cleanly, feel free to do so.

I also removed the zlib-system option to configure, which is no longer a "recognized option" (and may not have been before, but was just ignored).

Build log (GUI OFF):
https://heesakkers.info/showandtell/gpsbabel-1.7.0_GUI_OFF.log

Build log (GUI ON):
https://heesakkers.info/showandtell/gpsbabel-1.7.0_GUI_ON.log

*: https://github.com/gpsbabel/gpsbabel/pull/396
